emotional_tone: White, Golden, Calm energy. Premium, exclusive, and approachable.

typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' approach. Classic, highly legible serif for prominent headings with tight tracking, paired with a modern, sterile geometric sans-serif for body copy and data labels.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to convey luxury and calm.

grid_strategy.general: Bento Grid Mode A for promotional sections (Services, Home). High asymmetry.
grid_strategy.inventory: Control Room Grid Mode B for Used Cars page. 1/4 sidebar for filters, 3/4 for car grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3).

surfaces.header: Glassmorphism: bg-[#FAFAFA]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20. Must be sticky top-0 z-50.
surfaces.cards_inventory: Neumorphism tactile variant: bg-[#FFFFFF] shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all border border-black/5 rounded-none.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0B132B] hover:bg-[#C5A059] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0B132B] text-[#0B132B] hover:bg-[#0B132B] hover:text-[#FAFAFA] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-sm

components.navigation: Clear links, prominent 'Book a Test Drive' primary CTA in nav. Do not hide on desktop.
components.hero: Full-width layout or split-screen. If full width image, use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FAFAFA]/90 via-[#FAFAFA]/60 to-transparent on the left to ensure text legibility.
components.inventory_sidebar_filters: Use Shadcn Accordions and Checkboxes. Sections: Condition (Pre-Owned 44), Exterior Color, Interior Color, Drivetrain, Fuel Type, City/Hwy MPG, Transmission. Background should be #F3EBE1 (Vanilla).
components.inventory_card: Image on top, Title, Key Specs (Mileage, Drivetrain, MPG) as small labels, Price in prominent Serif font. CTA 'View Details' or 'Test Drive'.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Inputs and Selects. Restyle borders to use focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-[#D4AF37] rounded-none. bg-white.
components.testimonials: Carousel or Bento grid. Use large Serif quotes. bg-[#0B132B] text-[#FAFAFA] for high contrast section.
components.pricing: Minimalist columns. Border-collapse style grid or sleek list. Highlight premium tiers with golden accents.

hero_image.description: A stunning white luxury car displayed in a modern showroom setting.

inventory_cars.description: Sleek luxury cars showcased in a stylish, modern automotive dealership.
White and black coupe beside white building

interior_dealership.description: Sleek Bentley cars showcased in a contemporary indoor dealership space

micro_interactions.hover_states: All cards slightly lift (-translate-y-1) with increased shadow. Golden buttons shift to slightly darker gold.
micro_interactions.image_hover: Subtle scale (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden container for vehicle cards.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (filters, 'Book a Test Drive' buttons, form submits, nav links) MUST include role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='nav-inventory-link', data-testid='filter-exterior-color').
instructions_to_main_agent: Build out the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI primitives.
Ensure all 9 sections are implemented: Nav, Hero, Services, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact, Buy Used Cars, Sell Used Cars, Finance.
Implement the full sidebar filter in 'Buy Used Cars' including Condition, Exterior Color, Interior Color, Drivetrain, Fuel Type, MPG buckets, and Transmission as requested in the prompt.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Outfit for body text.
The primary CTA 'Book a Test Drive' should trigger a modal or navigate to a contact form.
Use the color palette strictly: Creamy (#FAFAFA), Vanilla (#F3EBE1), Golden (#D4AF37), and Dark Blue (#0B132B) for high contrast sections.
Avoid standard border radiuses. Use rounded-none for a sharper, more premium editorial feel.
